title: Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki.
titleRomaji: Ojisan wa Kawaii Mono ga Osuki.
titleNative: おじさんはカワイイものがお好き。
synopsis: The manga centers on Mitsutaka Oji, a 40-year-old man who by all appearances is attractive and cool and is excellent at his job. However, he has a secret: he absolutely loves small and cute things. The comedy manga follows his everyday life. (Source: ANN)

title: Quiet Please!
titleNative: 제발 조용히 좀 해!
synopsis: One month into living on his own, Yi-hyuk was hoping for an exciting, dramatic start to his independent life—but not this kind of drama. What he doesn’t expect is to be tormented by the thunderous noise coming from the apartment next door. Determined to put an end to it, he confronts his neighbor—only to make things infinitely worse when he accidentally punches him in the face. Yi-hyuk tries everything—from childish pranks to petty power plays—but his neighbor just won’t budge. He even pleads on his knees to make the noise stop. Just when it seems the feud will never end, they finally manage to call an uneasy truce. And somewhere along the way, Yi-hyuk realizes he might be falling for the very person who once drove him up the wall. (Source: Minam)

title: Hangyodon no Parallel Daisakusen
titleNative: ハンギョドンのパラレル大作戦
synonyms: 「ハンギョドンのパラレル大作戦」シリーズ
Hangyodon's Parallel Strategy Series
Hangyodon no Parallel Daisakusen Series
ハンギョドンのパラレル大作戦 恐竜王国は大さわぎ
Hangyodon no Parallel Daisakusen: Kyouryuu Oukoku wa Oosawagi
Hangyodon's Parallel Strategy: Panic at the Dinosaur Kingdom
ハンギョドンのパラレル大作戦 未来世界は大さわぎ
Hangyodon no Parallel Daisakusen: Mirai Sekai wa Oosawagi
Hangyodon’s Great Parallel Operation: A Huge Uproar in the Future World
ハンギョドンのパラレル大作戦 花のお江戸は大さわぎ
Hangyodon no Parallel Daisakusen: Hana no Oedo wa Oosawagi
Hangyodon's Great Parallel Plan: Flowery Edo in an Uproar
synopsis: Three-part series about Hangyodon and friend's time travel adventures. This entry contains: 1. Kyouryuu Oukoku wa Oosawagi (恐竜王国は大さわぎ) Hangyodon and company end up getting sent back to the past through Itaro's latest Time Closet invention and have themselves a prehistoric adventure! 2. Mirai Sekai wa Oosawagi (未来世界は大さわぎ) Hangyodon and his friends travel into the futuristic 25th century in order to stop Xian Long Bao and save Princess Kingyochan as well as her father, the emperor Chuuka Taijin. The gang might also run into a familiar face or two.... 3. Hana no Oedo wa Oosawagi (花のお江戸は大さわぎ) Hangyodon, Sayuri, and Otamaro are tasked with going back in time to the Edo period at the insistence of rich old Sea-Otter and his ghostly ancestor to retrieve their golden Kannon statue heirloom. Once in the Edo period, Hangyodon and his friends learn of the Full-Moon Kozou, a thief said to soon steal the statue on the next full moon which is rapidly approaching... But just who is the real identity

title: Wadachi wo Koete Yuke
titleNative: 轍を越えてゆけ
synonyms: Beyond the Trail
synopsis: In the shadow of a ruinous war, three young women are serving as soldiers in a barren, snow-swept landscape. Their task is to scour the frozen wastes for stragglers of the Iron Army, eerie, formerly human flesh-weapons. Gros and especially the inexperienced Leichte admire Esus, stronger and wiser than they. Esus has her weaknesses, though, and unhealed wounds in her heart. Somewhere out there in the vast, deadly sea of snow lie answers—to Esus' pain, and to the awful secret of this war. (Source: fantasiafestival.com)

title: Yowaki MAX Reijou Nano ni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
titleRomaji: Yowaki MAX Reijou Nano ni, Ratsuwan Konyakusha-sama no Kake ni Notte Shimatta
titleNative: 弱気MAX令嬢なのに、辣腕婚約者様の賭けに乗ってしまった
synonyms: Even Though I'm a Super Timid Noble Girl, I Accepted the Bet From My Cunning Fiancé
synopsis: I was reborn as a villainous daughter in a reverse harem otome game. After being sick with a high fever at the age of 10, Pia Rockwell suddenly remembered her past life as a university student in Japan. But far from going down the villainess route, all this super timid girl wants is to finally use her knowledge from when she was a grad student studying to get her doctorate in paleontology. Her ultimate goal is to become a commoner, excavate fossils, build a museum and then become a curator. So in order to escape the villainess route and avoid being deported by her fiancé during the graduation ball, Pia decides to avoid the upcoming hurt and heartache and asks to break off her engagement to Rufus, the Prime Minister's son. But will her cunning fiancé let her go that easily?
